parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'veeqo', job_name: 'veeqo_orders_sync', status: 'running', cursor_start: $('Build Config').first().json.sinceDate || 'full' }) }}

={{ (() => { const t = $('Transform Order').first().json; const custId = (Array.isArray($json) ? $json[0] : $json)?.id || null; const addrs = []; if (t.shippingAddress) addrs.push({...t.shippingAddress, customer_id: custId}); if (t.billingAddress) addrs.push({...t.billingAddress, customer_id: custId}); return addrs.length ? JSON.stringify(addrs) : '[]'; })() }}
